description: A lively horse racing scene at a racecourse, rendered in bold, impressionistic brushwork. Several jockeys in colorful silks ride horses along a green track, framed by autumn trees with golden and green foliage. Spectators, including a woman in the lower right, watch from behind a fence. A white building is visible in the background. The paint is applied in thick, energetic strokes with vivid greens, yellows, and reds creating a sense of movement and autumnal atmosphere.
